chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 183 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Ashique Hussain D. Solangi, Advocate for applicant Ms. Sana Memon APG Mr. Mumtaz Ali Soomro Advocate files Vakalatnama for complainant, taken on record. The applicant has been in jail for a period of six months in a crime that carries a potential sentence of three years. By the time this case is heard and concluded he would have lived out his sentence without being adjudicated guilty. The applicant has no previous criminal record. Accordingly he is admitted to post-arrest bail against a surety of Rs. 5,00,000/- (Five Lacs) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial court. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
